prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 3.8L twin-turbo V8 (Ford-derived *Ginetta GMA.38TT* engine code) with a fully built *Ginetta GMA.38TTX* forged internals kit from *Manley Performance*, featuring billet crankshaft, forged H-beam connecting rods, and forged aluminum pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) for 25 psi boost tolerance. Pair with *Carrillo* rod bolts and *ARP* head studs for 1,200+ hp capability.

Forced Induction: Swap the OEM turbos for a *Garrett GTX5533R Gen II* twin-turbo setup with *Tial MV-R* 60mm wastegates and *TurboSmart* 66mm blow-off valves. Custom *PTP Turbo* inconel manifolds and *Vibrant* 4-inch titanium downpipes with *SCS* 4-ply silicone couplers. Intercooler upgrade to *PWR* 4.5-core bar-and-plate unit with *Mishimoto* 3-inch aluminum piping and *AEM* water/methanol injection (50/50 mix) for intake temps under 40°C at full boost.

Drivetrain & Handling: Install a *Quaife ATB* helical LSD in the transaxle (Ginetta-specific *Xtrac P1227* sequential gearbox) with *PPG* straight-cut gears (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.18, 3rd: 1.70) and *Tilton* triple-plate carbon clutch. Suspension overhaul with *Öhlins TTX40* 3-way adjustable coilovers (24-click rebound, 22-click compression, 12-click high-speed compression), *Eibach* 1,200 lb/in springs, and *Tillet* B12 carbon fiber seats with *Schroth* 6-point harnesses. Chassis reinforcement via *Ginetta Motorsport* carbon fiber monocoque stiffening plates and *AP Racing* CP9430-8 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers with *PFC* 380mm two-piece rotors.
estetica: Aerodynamics: *Liberty Walk* Akula-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, front splitter with *Vortex* generators, and a *Rocket Bunny*-inspired ducktail rear wing with *Aeroflow* active Gurney flap). Underbody *Ginetta Motorsport* carbon diffuser with *Vortech* vortex generators and *Airdyne* NACA ducts for brake cooling. Replace OEM side skirts with *Seibon* carbon fiber units featuring integrated *LED* turn signals.

Exterior Styling: Full *3M* Matte Military Green (*3M 1080-M227*) vinyl wrap with *Xpel* Stealth PPF on high-impact zones (front bumper, mirrors, rocker panels). *VMR* V710 20x12 (front) and 21x13 (rear) forged wheels in *Brushed Titanium* finish, wrapped in *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R* tires (285/30 R20 front, 335/25 R21 rear). *Anzo* USA LED headlights with *Morimoto* HID projectors and *Lux* H8 angel eyes. *Valenti* CNC-machined billet taillight housings with *Philips* LED strips.

Interior & Details: *Recaro* SPG XL carbon fiber seats with *Alcantara* suede inserts and *Sabelt* 6-point harnesses. *MOMO* *Mod.77* steering wheel with *Ginetta* embroidered logo and *AiM* MXS Strada dash display. *Rolls-Royce* *Phantom*-inspired *Bowers & Wilkins* Diamond Series 18-speaker audio system with *Dynaudio* subwoofer. *Vais* carbon fiber shift knob for the *Xtrac* sequential gearbox, and *Brembo* GT-R-style brake bias adjuster. *LED* ambient lighting with *Philips* Hue integration for customizable RGB effects.
